The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Schetui]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Schetui]] [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[en:draft:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] [[sn:chetui]] [[sn: failed]]

{{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|de|Baktiu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Schetui]][[Category:Ancient Egyptian Day link incomplete]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Schetui]] [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[en:draft:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] [[sn:chetui]] [[sn: failed]] [[Category:Dekanstern (Altägypten)]]

{{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Schetui]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:qq]] }} [[sn:Schetui]] [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[sn:chetui]] [[sn: failed]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]]

{{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui

During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. revision.comment: Text replacement - "paes with no wikidata" to "Pages with no Wikidata"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Schetui]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[sn:Schetui]] }} [[sn:Schetui]] [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[sn:chetui]] [[sn: failed]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]]

''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[sn:Schetui]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[sn:Schetui]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[sn:Schetui]] }} [[sn:Schetui]] [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[sn:chetui]] [[sn: failed]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]] [[Category:Pages with no Wikidata]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Ancient Egyptian Decan Stars" to "Ancient Egyptian Decans"
revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q2233884]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}}

The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] [[Category:Matching pagename on wikidata]]

''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]][[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. revision.text:
[[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q2233884]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = [[:en:Middle Kingdom of Egypt|Middle Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = [[:en:New Kingdom of Egypt|New Kingdom of Egypt]] |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an [[:en:Ancient Egypt|Ancient Egypt]] [[:en:Decan|Decan]], which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian [[:en:Constellation|Constellation]] {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the [[:en:Cancer (constellation)|Cancer (constellation)]] constellation, where the [[:en:Star|Star]]s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The [[:en:Heliacal rising|Heliacal rising]] was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under [[:en:Senusret III|Senusret III]] ([[:en:Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt]]) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} {{draft categories| }} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

During the reign of [[:en:Ramesses II|Ramesses II]], the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * [[:en:Christian Leitz|Christian Leitz]]: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

revision.text:
[[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q2233884]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:25, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:08, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an {{ill|Ancient Egypt|en|Ancient Egypt|WD=Q11768|lt=Ancient Egypt}} {{ill|Decan|en|Decan|WD=Q5248738|lt=Decan}}, which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian {{ill|Constellation|en|Constellation|WD=Q8928|lt=Constellation}} {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the {{ill|Cancer (constellation)|en|Cancer (constellation)|WD=Q8849|lt=Cancer (constellation)}} constellation, where the {{ill|Star|en|Star|WD=Q523|lt=Star}}s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The {{ill|Heliacal rising|en|Heliacal rising|WD=Q368373|lt=Heliacal rising}} was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under {{ill|Senusret III|en|Senusret III|WD=Q19248|lt=Senusret III}} ({{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|WD=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of {{ill|Ramesses II|en|Ramesses II|WD=Q1523|lt=Ramesses II}}, the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz}}: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

The {{ill|Heliacal rising|en|Heliacal rising|WD=Q368373|lt=Heliacal rising}} was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under {{ill|Senusret III|en|Senusret III|WD=Q19248|lt=Senusret III}} ({{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|WD=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of {{ill|Ramesses II|en|Ramesses II|WD=Q1523|lt=Ramesses II}}, the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz}}: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. [[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an {{ill|Ancient Egypt|en|Ancient Egypt|WD=Q11768|lt=Ancient Egypt}} {{ill|Decan|en|Decan|WD=Q5248738|lt=Decan}}, which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian {{ill|Constellation|en|Constellation|WD=Q8928|lt=Constellation}} {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the {{ill|Cancer (constellation)|en|Cancer (constellation)|WD=Q8849|lt=Cancer (constellation)}} constellation, where the {{ill|Star|en|Star|WD=Q523|lt=Star}}s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The {{ill|Heliacal rising|en|Heliacal rising|WD=Q368373|lt=Heliacal rising}} was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under {{ill|Senusret III|en|Senusret III|WD=Q19248|lt=Senusret III}} ({{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|WD=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of {{ill|Ramesses II|en|Ramesses II|WD=Q1523|lt=Ramesses II}}, the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz}}: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]]

During the reign of {{ill|Ramesses II|en|Ramesses II|WD=Q1523|lt=Ramesses II|1=Ramesses II}}, the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz|1=Christian Leitz}}: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''. The Carsten Niebuhr Institute of Ancient Eastern Studies (et al.), Copenhagen 2007, ISBN 978-87-635-0406-5, pp. 62–67 and 385. {{translated page|de|Schetui|version=|comment=Imported full de history, revisions duplicated and version not here due to an error with my bot related to the German being under the same pagename as the english}} [[ja:シェトゥイ]] [[de:Schetui]] {{wikidata link|Q2233884}} [[Category:Ancient Egyptian Decans]] [[Category:Completion tier 3]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Ancient Egypt]] [[Category:pages]]

[[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] [[de:Schetui]] {{Infobox hieroglyphs two-columns |NAME-ERWEITERT = {{ill|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|en|Middle Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q191324|lt=Middle Kingdom of Egypt|1=Middle Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME = I2-Z2:X1 N14-N33*N33:N33 |NAME2-ERWEITERT = {{ill|New Kingdom of Egypt|en|New Kingdom of Egypt|WD=Q180568|lt=New Kingdom of Egypt|1=New Kingdom of Egypt}} |NAME2 = N14-N37:V13-G43-I2-I2 |NAME2-ERKLÄRUNG = Schetui
''Štw.t'' (read: ''Št.wj'')
''Turtles'' |BILD1 = Sternbild Krebs.jpg |BILD1-BREITE = 280px }} '''Schetui''' is the designation of an {{ill|Ancient Egypt|en|Ancient Egypt|WD=Q11768|lt=Ancient Egypt|1=Ancient Egypt}} {{ill|Decan|en|Decan|WD=Q5248738|lt=Decan|1=Decan}}, which comprised three {{ill|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|de|Baktiu|1=Baktiu|2=de|3=Baktiu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Baktiu|qq=}} (decan stars). Together with the decan {{ill|Ab (decan)|de|Ab (Dekan)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab (decan)|qq=}}, Schetui formed the Ancient Egyptian {{ill|Constellation|en|Constellation|WD=Q8928|lt=Constellation|1=Constellation}} {{ill|Ab-Schetui|de|Ab-Schetui|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ab-Schetui|qq=}}. The decan Schetui corresponds to the first part of the {{ill|Cancer (constellation)|en|Cancer (constellation)|WD=Q8849|lt=Cancer (constellation)|1=Cancer (constellation)}} constellation, where the {{ill|Star|en|Star|WD=Q523|lt=Star|1=Star}}s {{ill|Iota Cancri|de|ι Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iota Cancri|qq=}}, {{ill|Gamma Cancri|de|Gamma Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gamma Cancri|qq=}}, and {{ill|Delta Cancri|de|Delta Cancri|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Delta Cancri|qq=}} formed the head of the {{ill|Turtle|de|Schildkröte|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Turtle|qq=}}. In the decan lists of the {{ill|Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|lt=Pharaonic period|de|Nutbuch#Pharaonische Zeit|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Book of Nut#Pharaonic period|qq=}}, Schetui represented the 36th decan on the body of {{ill|Nut (Egyptian mythology)|de|Nut (Ägyptische Mythologie)|1=Nut (goddess)|lt=Nut|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (Egyptian mythology)|13=User:Immanuelle/Nut (goddess)|qq=}}. The {{ill|Heliacal rising|en|Heliacal rising|WD=Q368373|lt=Heliacal rising|1=Heliacal rising}} was set for the {{ill|Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|lt=26th Peret IV|de|26. Peret IV|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Peret (Ancient Egypt)#Dating|qq=}}, based on the arrangement ordered under {{ill|Senusret III|en|Senusret III|WD=Q19248|lt=Senusret III|1=Senusret III}} ({{ill|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|en|Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|WD=Q719639|lt=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt|1=Twelfth Dynasty of Egypt}}) in his seventh year of reign. During the reign of {{ill|Ramesses II|en|Ramesses II|WD=Q1523|lt=Ramesses II|1=Ramesses II}}, the {{ill|Akronychical culmination|lt=akronychische Kulmination|de|Akronychisch#Akronychische Kulmination sowie akronychische Auf- und Untergänge bestimmter Sterne|1=Acronychic|lt=Acronychical culmination|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akronychical culmination|13=User:Immanuelle/Acronychic|qq=}} of Schetui was recorded for the {{ill|Achet#Dating|lt=fourth Achet month|de|vierten Achetmonat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Achet#Dating|qq=}}, indicating possible periods for 1279 BCE (September 25 to October 24) and 1214 BCE (September 12 to October 11). == Literature == * {{ill|Christian Leitz|en|Christian Leitz|WD=Q1080802|lt=Christian Leitz|1=Christian Leitz}}: ''Altägyptische Sternuhren''. Peeters, Leuven 1995, ISBN 90-6831-669-9, p. 95. * Siegfried Schott: ''Altägyptische Festdaten''. Verlag der Akademie der Wissenschaften und der Literatur, Mainz/ Wiesbaden 1950, pp. 12–13. * {{ill|Alexandra von Lieven|fr|Alexandra von Lieven|de|Alexandra von Lieven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexandra von Lieven|qq=}}: ''Grundriss des Laufes der Sterne – Das sogenannte Nutbuch''.
